description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric. The sofa features deep, plush seat and back cushions that appear loose and generously filled, providing a soft and inviting seating experience. The sectional consists of two main segments forming a right angle, with one segment extending into a chaise lounge for added comfort. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, creating a uniform, boxy silhouette, and the armrests are thick and padded for additional support. The base of the sofa is low to the ground, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing its clean and understated aesthetic.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with plush, loose cushions and a smooth, light beige fabric. It features a modern, boxy silhouette with thick, padded armrests and a low, legless base.
description_view_0: The sofa is seen from above, clearly showing its L-shaped sectional layout and the arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the seat cushions and the thick, padded armrest on the right, as well as the chaise lounge extension on the left.
description_view_2: A straight-on view of the longer backrest side, displaying the uniform height of the back and armrests and the continuous row of cushions.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the chaise lounge section and the sofa's low, solid base, with the armrest visible on the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven loose, plush seat cushions and seven matching back cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, padded armrests present at both ends of the sectional, matching the height of the backrest with a straight, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears solid and continuous, giving the sofa a grounded, legless look.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with loose, plush cushions; no tufting or segmentation visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
